info.description: The Amazon Shipping API is designed to support outbound shipping use cases both for orders originating on Amazon-owned marketplaces as well as external channels/marketplaces. With these APIs, you can request shipping rates, create shipments, cancel shipments, and track shipments.
info.title: Amazon Shipping API

get.description:
Returns tracking information for a purchased shipment.

**Usage Plan:**

| Rate (requests per second) | Burst |
| ---- | ---- |
| 80 | 100 |

The `x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit` response header returns the usage plan rate limits that were applied to the requested operation, when available. The table above indicates the default rate and burst values for this operation. Selling partners whose business demands require higher throughput may see higher rate and burst values then those shown here. For more information, see [Usage Plans and Rate Limits in the Selling Partner API](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/usage-plans-and-rate-limits-in-the-sp-api).

parameters.name: trackingId
parameters.description: A carrier-generated tracking identifier originally returned by the purchaseShipment operation.

parameters.name: carrierId
parameters.description: A carrier identifier originally returned by the getRates operation for the selected rate.

parameters.name: x-amzn-shipping-business-id
parameters.description: Amazon shipping business to assume for this request. The default is AmazonShipping_UK.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The United States Amazon shipping business.
The India Amazon shipping business.
The United Kingdom Amazon shipping business.
The United Arab Emirates Amazon shipping business.
The Saudi Arabia Amazon shipping business.
The Egypt Amazon shipping business.
The Italy Amazon shipping business.
The Spain Amazon shipping business.
The France Amazon shipping business.
The Japan Amazon shipping business.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

401.description: The request's Authorization header is not formatted correctly or does not contain a valid token.

errors.message: You don't have access to the requested response or the credentials are invalid.

403.description: Indicates that access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, or Invalid Signature.

errors.message: You don't have access to the requested response or the credentials are invalid.

404.description: The resource specified does not exist.

errors.message: The requested resource is invalid or doesn't exist

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

413.description: The request size exceeded the maximum accepted size.

errors.message: The request payload size is greater than maximum accepted size.

415.description: The request payload is in an unsupported format.

errors.message: The request payload format is not supported.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

errors.message: The total number of requests exceeded your allowed limit.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

errors.message: Something went wrong while processing the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

errors.message: Service temporarily unavailable or down for maintenance. Please try again after sometime.

GetTrackingResponse.description: The response schema for the getTracking operation.

TrackingDetailCodes.description: Contains detail codes that provide additional details related to the forward and return leg of the shipment.

forward.description: Contains detail codes that provide additional details related to the forward leg of the shipment.

returns.description: Contains detail codes that provide additional details related to the return leg of the shipment.

City.description: The city or town where the person, business or institution is located.

PostalCode.description: The postal code of that address. It contains a series of letters or digits or both, sometimes including spaces or punctuation.

StateOrRegion.description: The state, county or region where the person, business or institution is located.

DetailCodes.description: A list of codes used to provide additional shipment information.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Attempted delivery but the business was closed.
Attempted delivery but the recipient was unavailable.
Attempted delivery but cash was not available from recipient.
Attempted delivery but the recipient did not have the PIN available.
Delivery was attempted.
Attempted delivery but could not access the recipient location.
Attempted delivery but unable to contact the recipient to coordinate delivery.
Shipment delivered behind wheelie bin.
Shipment delivered to front porch or front door.
Shipment delivered to garage.
Shipment delivered to garden.
Shipment delivered to greenhouse.
Shipment delivered to letterbox/mail slot.
Shipment delivered to mailroom.
Shipment delivered and signed for by neighbor.
Shipment delivered to rear porch or rear door.
Shipment delivered to reception.
Shipment delivered to shed.
Shipment delivered with onetime passcode.
Shipment delivered and signature received.

Shipment was damaged. When paired with Rejected this indicates the recipient refused to accept the shipment because the shipment was damaged. When paired with UNDELIVERABLE it means the shipment was undeliverable due to being damaged and may be returned to the seller.
Recipient refused to accept the shipment because the shipment contains incorrect item/s.
Recipient refused to accept the shipment because the recipient did not want the shipment.
Recipient refused to accept the shipment.
Recipient refused to accept the shipment and provided verification.
Shipment was cancelled by the recipient. This tag is paired with the rejected shipment status.
Shipment is undeliverable and is returning to seller because the address was missing or incorrect.
Shipment is non-compliant Hazmat.
Shipment is undeliverable and is returning to the seller.
Package arrived at the local facility.

Location.description: The location where the person, business or institution is located.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Package has been created and is ready for pickup at the shippers location. This is a pre-transit status event code.
Package has been picked up by the service provider.
Package has been delivered.
Package has departed from a particular location in carrier network.
Delivery was attempted, but was unsuccessful.
Package is lost.
Package is out for delivery.
Package is in transit and has been received at a carrier location.
Package was rejected by the recipient.
Package is undeliverable.
Pickup scheduled for the package was cancelled.
Return label has been generated.
Package held for recipient pickup.
Recipient has requested an update to their delivery date.

AlternateLegTrackingId.description: The carrier generated reverse identifier for a returned package in a purchased shipment.

ErrorList.description: A list of error responses returned when a request is unsuccessful.

Status.description: The status of the package being shipped.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Package has been created but has not been picked up.
Package has been picked up and is in transit.
Package has has been delivered successfully.
Package is lost.
Package is out for delivery.
Package has been rejected by the recipient.
Package was undeliverable.
Delivery was attempted to the recipient location, but was not delivered.
Pickup was cancelled for the package.
Package held at facility for the customer pickup.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

eventTime.description: The ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of the event.

CountryCode.description: The two digit country code. Follows ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

promisedDeliveryDate.description: The date and time by which the shipment is promised to be delivered.

GetTrackingResult.description: The payload for the getTracking operation.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Additional information about shipment representing package journey from origin address to destination address in the transportation/shipping request.
Additional information about shipment representing package journey from destination address to origin/return address in the original transportation/shipping request.

TrackingId.description: The carrier generated identifier for a package in a purchased shipment.
